latin: Puella in mundum spirituum ingressa est. parentes eius in sues mutati erant quia nimis ederant. nunc sola laborare debebat ut eos liberaret.

questions.prompt: What happened to the girl's parents?

translation: A girl entered the world of spirits. Her parents had been turned into pigs because they ate too much. Now she had to work alone in order to free them.
